title: Pacific Biosciences of California Inc (PACB) Reports Q3 2023 Earnings: Revenue Up 72% YoY
text: Pacific Biosciences of California Inc (PACB) reported Q3 2023 earnings with revenue up 72% year-over-year. Total revenue reached $55.7 million in Q3 2023, up 72.4% from $32.3 million in Q3 2022, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 15.3%. Instrument revenues were $34.7 million, up 204.4% year-over-year from continued momentum of Revio systems. Consumables revenues were $16.9 million, up 4.9% from prior-year quarter. Service and other revenues were $4.1 million, down 14% year-over-year. PacBio shipped 52 Revio sequencing systems in Q3 2023, bringing the installed base to 129 systems as of September 30. Adjusted loss per share was 27 cents, narrower than the consensus estimate of 30 cents. The company revised its 2023 full-year revenue forecast upward to between $195-200 million, marking 52-56% growth from 2022.
